Overview
OpenEMR API documentation for both FHIR API and Standard API.
FHIR API
FHIR API Documentation for 7.0.4
Click Here
for instructions on using Swagger, which is included in OpenEMR, to see full documentation of endpoints and testing support.
Online links to Swagger based documentation can be found at
7.0.4 Demo
.
Videos that overview OpenEMR's FHIR API:
OpenEMR FHIR Lecture Series: Lecture 1 - Overview and Use of FHIR in OpenEMR
OpenEMR FHIR Lecture Series: Lecture 2 - FHIR Bulk Data in OpenEMR
Specific instructions for a Clinical Summary of Care Document (CCD) request:
Instructions in API Documentation
Tutorial to Generate CCDA (With Screenshots)

Standard API Documentation for 7.0.4
Click Here
for instructions on using Swagger, which is included in OpenEMR, to see full documentation of endpoints and testing support.

Terms of use
This section is required for ONC certification. OpenEMR and the API is open source and licensed under the
GNU General Public License 3
.
Service Base URLs
Overview
This section is required for ONC certification. The 'Production Endpoints lists the FHIR Base URLs (ie. service base URLs) of the OpenEMR installations that are utilizing the ONC certification.
